## add taxonomy to cor table
```{r}
# prep bacterial genus
bcortax.pre <- as.data.frame(ps2.16s.precorr@tax_table@.Data)
bcortax <- data.frame(bcortax.pre$Genus)
colnames(bcortax)[1] <- "Genus"
bcortax

# prep viral species
vcortax.pre <- as.data.frame(ps2v.pf.precorr@tax_table@.Data)
vcortax <- data.frame(vcortax.pre$Species)
colnames(vcortax)[1] <- "Species"
vcortax

# merge
cc.tax <- merge(cc, bcortax, by.x = 2, by.y = 0)
cc.tax <- merge(cc.tax, vcortax, by.x = 2, by.y = 0)
cc.tax
```

## Plot as heatmap
```{r}
cc.temp <- cc.tax %>% filter(p.adj <= 0.05) #%>% filter(abs(Correlation) >= 0.5)
cc.temp


## FULL
pal <- wes_palette("Zissou1", 100, type = "continuous")
corrheat <- cc.tax %>% filter(Genus != "NA") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = reorder(Species, +Correlation), 
                       y = reorder(Genus, +Correlation), 
                       fill = Correlation)) + 
  geom_tile() +
  #scale_fill_gradientn(colours = pal) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = "blue", mid = "white", high = "red", midpoint = 0) +
  scale_x_discrete(expand = c(0, 0)) +
  scale_y_discrete(expand = c(0, 0)) + theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 1, vjust = 0.5)) +
  labs(fill = "Spearman\ncorrelation\ncoefficient") +
  xlab("Viral species") + ylab("Bacterial genus")
corrheat

png("heat.corr.OVERALL.FULL.png", width = 14, height = 8, units = "in", res = 600)
corrheat
dev.off()

## SIGNIFICANT
corrheat <- cc.temp %>% filter(Genus != "NA") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = reorder(Species, +Correlation), 
                       y = reorder(Genus, +Correlation), 
                       fill = Correlation)) + 
  geom_tile() +
  #scale_fill_gradientn(colours = pal) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = "blue", mid = "white", high = "red", midpoint = 0) +
  scale_x_discrete(expand = c(0, 0)) +
  scale_y_discrete(expand = c(0, 0)) + theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 1, vjust = 0.5)) +
  labs(fill = "Spearman\ncorrelation\ncoefficient") +
  xlab("Viral species") + ylab("Bacterial genus")
corrheat

png("heat.corr.OVERALL.SIG.png", width = 10, height = 8, units = "in", res = 600)
corrheat
dev.off()
```


## Repeat for wounds only
```{r}
# bacterial filter
bac.ra.ss <- subset_samples(bac.ra, Description == "Wound")
flist <- filterfun(kOverA(2,1))
ps2.16s.precorr <- filter_taxa(bac.ra.ss, flist, TRUE)
bac.ra.ss
ps2.16s.precorr

# viral filter
ps2.sgdra.ss <- subset_samples(ps2.sgdra, Description == "Wound")
flist <- filterfun(kOverA(2,1))
ps2v.pf.precorr <- filter_taxa(ps2.sgdra.ss, flist, TRUE)
ps2.sgdra.ss
ps2v.pf.precorr

# prepare the bacterial dataframe
# fix this so the genus names are the column names?
bdf <- data.frame(otu_table(ps2.16s.precorr), check.names = FALSE)
bdf.tax <- 
bdf.t <- transpose(bdf)
colnames(bdf.t) <- rownames(bdf)
rownames(bdf.t) <- colnames(bdf)
bdf
bdf.t

# prepare the viral dataframe
# fix this so the species names are the column names?

vdf <- data.frame(otu_table(ps2v.pf.precorr), check.names = FALSE)
vdf.t <- transpose(vdf)
colnames(vdf.t) <- rownames(vdf)
rownames(vdf.t) <- colnames(vdf)
vdf
vdf.t
```
## wound associate
```{r}
cc <- associate(vdf.t, bdf.t, method='spearman', order = TRUE, mode = 'table', filter.self.correlations = TRUE)
cc
```
## prep tax and plot
```{r}
# preview the correlation table
cc

# prep bacterial genus
bcortax.pre <- as.data.frame(ps2.16s.precorr@tax_table@.Data)
bcortax <- data.frame(bcortax.pre$Genus)
colnames(bcortax)[1] <- "Genus"
bcortax

# prep viral species
vcortax.pre <- as.data.frame(ps2v.pf.precorr@tax_table@.Data)
vcortax <- data.frame(vcortax.pre$Species)
colnames(vcortax)[1] <- "Species"
vcortax

# merge
cc.tax <- merge(cc, bcortax, by.x = 2, by.y = 0)
cc.tax <- merge(cc.tax, vcortax, by.x = 2, by.y = 0)
cc.tax

cc.temp <- cc.tax %>% filter(p.adj <= 0.05) #%>% filter(abs(Correlation) >= 0.5)
#cc.temp

## FULL
pal <- wes_palette("Zissou1", 100, type = "continuous")
corrheat.w <- cc.tax %>% filter(Genus != "NA") %>%
            ggplot(aes(x = reorder(Species, +Correlation), 
                       y = reorder(Genus, +Correlation), 
                       fill = Correlation)) + 
  geom_tile() +
  #scale_fill_gradientn(colours = pal) + 
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = "blue", mid = "white", high = "red", midpoint = 0) +
  scale_x_discrete(expand = c(0, 0)) +
  scale_y_discrete(expand = c(0, 0)) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 1, vjust = 0.5)) +
  labs(fill = "Spearman\ncorrelation\ncoefficient") +
  xlab("Viral species") + ylab("Bacterial genus") #+ ggtitle("Wound Correlations")
corrheat.w

png("heat.corr.WOUNDS.FULL.png", width = 12, height = 6, units = "in", res = 600)
corrheat.w
dev.off()

## SIGNIFICANT
pal <- wes_palette("Zissou1", 100, type = "continuous")
corrheat.w <- cc.temp %>% filter(Genus != "NA") %>%
            ggplot(aes(x = Species, 
                       y = Genus, 
                       fill = Correlation)) + 
  geom_tile() +
  #scale_fill_gradientn(colours = pal) + 
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = "blue", mid = "white", high = "red", midpoint = 0) +
  scale_x_discrete(expand = c(0, 0)) +
  scale_y_discrete(expand = c(0, 0)) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 1, vjust = 0.5)) +
  labs(fill = "Spearman\ncorrelation\ncoefficient") +
  xlab("Viral species") + ylab("Bacterial genus") #+ ggtitle("Wound Correlations")
corrheat.w

png("heat.corr.WOUNDS.SIG.png", width = 6, height = 4, units = "in", res = 600)
corrheat.w
dev.off()
```

## Repeat for skin
```{r}
# bacterial filter
bac.ra.ss <- subset_samples(bac.ra, Description == "Skin")
flist <- filterfun(kOverA(2,0.1))
ps2.16s.precorr <- filter_taxa(bac.ra.ss, flist, TRUE)
bac.ra.ss
ps2.16s.precorr

# viral filter
ps2.sgdra.ss <- subset_samples(ps2.sgdra, Description == "Skin")
flist <- filterfun(kOverA(2,0.1))
ps2v.pf.precorr <- filter_taxa(ps2.sgdra.ss, flist, TRUE)
ps2.sgdra.ss
ps2v.pf.precorr

# prepare the bacterial dataframe
# fix this so the genus names are the column names?
bdf <- data.frame(otu_table(ps2.16s.precorr), check.names = FALSE)
bdf.tax <- 
bdf.t <- transpose(bdf)
colnames(bdf.t) <- rownames(bdf)
rownames(bdf.t) <- colnames(bdf)
bdf
bdf.t

# prepare the viral dataframe
# fix this so the species names are the column names?

vdf <- data.frame(otu_table(ps2v.pf.precorr), check.names = FALSE)
vdf.t <- transpose(vdf)
colnames(vdf.t) <- rownames(vdf)
rownames(vdf.t) <- colnames(vdf)
vdf
vdf.t

```

## skin associate
```{r}
cc <- associate(vdf.t, bdf.t, method='spearman', order = TRUE, mode = 'table', filter.self.correlations = TRUE)
cc
```
## prep tax and plot
```{r}
# preview the correlation table
cc

# prep bacterial genus
bcortax.pre <- as.data.frame(ps2.16s.precorr@tax_table@.Data)
bcortax <- data.frame(bcortax.pre$Genus)
colnames(bcortax)[1] <- "Genus"
bcortax

# prep viral species
vcortax.pre <- as.data.frame(ps2v.pf.precorr@tax_table@.Data)
vcortax <- data.frame(vcortax.pre$Species)
colnames(vcortax)[1] <- "Species"
vcortax

# merge
cc.tax <- merge(cc, bcortax, by.x = 2, by.y = 0)
cc.tax <- merge(cc.tax, vcortax, by.x = 2, by.y = 0)
cc.tax

cc.temp <- cc.tax %>% filter(p.adj <= 0.05) #%>% filter(abs(Correlation) >= 0.5)
#cc.temp

pal <- wes_palette("Zissou1", 5, type = "continuous")
corrheat.s <- ggplot(cc.tax, 
                   aes(x = reorder(Species, +Correlation), 
                       y = reorder(Genus, +Correlation), 
                       fill = Correlation)) + 
  geom_tile() +
  #scale_fill_gradientn(colours = pal) + 
  scale_fill_gradientn(colours = c("blue", "white", "red")) +
  scale_x_discrete(expand = c(0, 0)) +
  scale_y_discrete(expand = c(0, 0)) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 1, vjust = 0.5)) +
  xlab("Viral species") + ylab("Bacterial genus") + ggtitle("Skin Correlations")
corrheat.s

png("heat.corr.SKIN.ALL.png", width = 8, height = 8, units = "in", res = 600)
corrheat.s
dev.off()
```


# Differential Abundance Analysis w/ DESeq2
```{r}
library(phyloseq)
library(genefilter)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggpubr)
library(reshape2)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(viridis)
library(wesanderson)
library(grid)
library(gridExtra)
library(plotly)
library(scales)
library(dplyr)
set.seed(1)
```


# File Import & Phyloseq Conversion
```{r}
# Import mapping
map_file <- "/Users/sverbanic/Desktop/PS2VB.taxtables/ps2mapping.deseq.virome.txt"
deseq.map <- import_qiime_sample_data(map_file)

SAM <- sample_data(deseq.map)

# use phyloseq object "ps2.sgd" generated in virome.primary.analysis.Rmd workup
ps2v.pf <- ps2.sgd
sample_data(ps2v.pf) <- SAM
```

# DESeq Analyses
```{r}
# DESeq2 differential abundance analysis
# Overall comparisons

library(DESeq2)

flist <- filterfun(kOverA(2,10))
ps2v.pf <- filter_taxa(ps2v.pf, flist, TRUE)
otu_table(ps2v.pf) <- otu_table(ps2v.pf) + 1

# These lines will produce the original DESeq2 object, and run the first comparison 
# convert to DESeq2
ps2.dds = phyloseq_to_deseq2(ps2v.pf, ~ 1)
# refactor levels for desired comparisons
ps2.dds$SampleType <- factor(ps2.dds$SampleType, levels = c("Pre-Debridement","Post-Debridement","Skin"))
# specify experiment design
design(ps2.dds) <- ~ SampleType
# run DESeq
dds.out = DESeq(ps2.dds, test="Wald", fitType="parametric")

# Pre vs. Skin Results
res.ps = results(dds.out, contrast = c("SampleType","Pre-Debridement","Skin"), cooksCutoff = FALSE)
write.csv(res.ps, "pre.vs.skin.csv")

# Pre vs. Post Overall Results
res.pp = results(dds.out, contrast = c("SampleType","Pre-Debridement","Post-Debridement"), cooksCutoff = FALSE)
write.csv(res.pp, "pre.vs.post.overall.csv")

# Wound (Pre + Post) vs. Skin DESeq & Results
ps2.dds$Description <- as.factor(ps2.dds$Description)
design(ps2.dds) <- ~ Description
dds.out = DESeq(ps2.dds, test="Wald", fitType="parametric")
res.ws = results(dds.out, contrast = c("Description","Wound","Skin"), cooksCutoff = FALSE)
write.csv(res.ws, "wound.vs.skin.overall.csv")

# Pre vs. Post HEALED ONLY DESeq & Results
# Create nested group & run DESeq
ps2.dds$group <- factor(paste0(ps2.dds$Outcome, ps2.dds$prepost))
design(ps2.dds) <- ~ group
dds.hu = DESeq(ps2.dds, test="Wald", fitType="parametric")
res.hpp = results(dds.hu, contrast = c("group","HealedPre","HealedPost"), cooksCutoff = FALSE)
write.csv(res.hpp, "pre.vs.post.healed.csv")

# Healed vs. Unhealed (Post- Only) Results
res.hupost = results(dds.hu, contrast = c("group","HealedPost","UnhealedPost"), cooksCutoff = FALSE)
write.csv(res.hupost, "healed.vs.unhealed.post.csv")

# Pre vs. Post UNHEALED ONLY DESeq & Results
# Create nested group & run DESeq
ps2.dds$group <- factor(paste0(ps2.dds$Outcome, ps2.dds$prepost))
# Refactor to get desired comparisons
ps2.dds$group <- factor(ps2.dds$group, levels = c("UnhealedPre","UnhealedPost","HealedPre","HealedPost","SkinControl"))
design(ps2.dds) <- ~ group
dds.hu = DESeq(ps2.dds, test="Wald", fitType="parametric")
res.upp = results(dds.hu, contrast = c("group","UnhealedPre","UnhealedPost"), cooksCutoff = FALSE)
write.csv(res.upp, "pre.vs.post.unhealed.csv")

# Healed vs. Unhealed (Skin) DESeq & Results
ps2.dds$SkinOutcome <- as.factor(ps2.dds$SkinOutcome)
design(ps2.dds) <- ~ SkinOutcome
dds.out = DESeq(ps2.dds, test="Wald", fitType="parametric")
res.hu.skin = results(dds.out, contrast = c("SkinOutcome","Healed","Unhealed"), cooksCutoff = FALSE)
write.csv(res.hu.skin, "healed.vs.unhealed.skin.csv")

# Healed vs. Unhealed (Overall) DESeq & Results
ps2.dds$Outcome <- as.factor(ps2.dds$Outcome)
design(ps2.dds) <- ~ Outcome
dds.out = DESeq(ps2.dds, test="Wald", fitType="parametric")
res.hu = results(dds.out, contrast = c("Outcome","Healed","Unhealed"), cooksCutoff = FALSE)
write.csv(res.hu, "healed.vs.unhealed.overall.csv")

# Healed vs. Unhealed (Pre- Only) Results
res.hupre = results(dds.hu, contrast = c("group","HealedPre","UnhealedPre"), cooksCutoff = FALSE)
write.csv(res.hupre, "healed.vs.unhealed.pre.csv")
```


# Significant OTU Visualizations
## Pre vs. Skin
```{r}
# estimate 95% confidence intervals
res.ps$error = (res.ps$lfcSE)
res.ps

pal <- wes_palette("Zissou1", 3, type = "continuous")

alpha = 0.05
sigtab = res.ps[which(res.ps$padj < alpha), ]
sigtab = cbind(as(sigtab, "data.frame"), as(tax_table(ps2v.pf)[rownames(sigtab), ], "matrix"))
head(sigtab)
dim(sigtab)
x = tapply(sigtab$log2FoldChange, sigtab$Species, function(x) max(x))
x = sort(x, TRUE)
sigtab$Species = factor(as.character(sigtab$Species), levels=names(x))

# Species order
x = tapply(sigtab$log2FoldChange, sigtab$Species, function(x) max(x))
x = sort(x, TRUE)
sigtab$Species = factor(as.character(sigtab$Species), levels=names(x))

# plot
p1 <- ggplot(sigtab, aes(y=Species, x=log2FoldChange, color=log2FoldChange)) + geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin=log2FoldChange-error, xmax=log2FoldChange+error), height=0.5, position=position_dodge(0.05), colour = "black") + geom_point(size=6) + theme_bw() + scale_color_gradientn(colours = pal) + 
  theme(text = element_text(size = 22), legend.position = "none", plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)) + 
  ggtitle("Skin vs. Pre-Debridement") + ylab("Species")
  #theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = -90, hjust = 0, vjust=0.5))
p1

sigrows = row.names(as.data.frame(p1$data))
outpal <- wes_palettes$Zissou1

p1b <- ps2.sgdra.melt %>% filter(ps2.sgdra.melt$OTU %in% sigrows)  %>%
  filter(SampleType != "Post-Debridement") %>%
  filter(!Abundance <= 0.0001) %>%
  group_by(Outcome, Species) %>%
  ggplot(aes(y=Species, x=Abundance, color=SampleType)) +
  geom_point(size=4) + theme_bw() +  
  theme(text = element_text(size = 22), 
        legend.position = "right",
        axis.text.y = element_blank(),
        axis.title.y = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)) +
  ggtitle("Relative abundance") + 
  scale_color_manual(values = outpal[c(5,1)], name = "Sample Type") +
  scale_x_log10() + xlab("Relative abundance (%)")
p1b  

x = tapply(sigtab$log2FoldChange, sigtab$Species, function(x) max(x))
x = sort(x, TRUE)
p1b$data$Species = factor(as.character(p1b$data$Species), levels=names(x))

png("pre.vs.skin.species.png", width = 20, height = 18, units = "in", res = 600)
grid.arrange(p1, p1b, widths=c(1,0.9), ncol = 2)
dev.off()
```

## Wounds (Pre + Post) vs. Skin
```{r}
# calc error
res.ws$error = (1.96*res.ws$lfcSE)
res.ws

alpha = 0.05
sigtab = res.ws[which(res.ws$padj < alpha), ]
sigtab = cbind(as(sigtab, "data.frame"), as(tax_table(ps2.pf)[rownames(sigtab), ], "matrix"))
head(sigtab)
dim(sigtab)
x = tapply(sigtab$log2FoldChange, sigtab$Type, function(x) max(x))
x = sort(x, TRUE)
sigtab$Type = factor(as.character(sigtab$Type), levels=names(x))

# Species order
x = tapply(sigtab$log2FoldChange, sigtab$Species, function(x) max(x))
x = sort(x, TRUE)
sigtab$Species = factor(as.character(sigtab$Species), levels=names(x))

# plot
p1 <- ggplot(sigtab, aes(y=Species, x=log2FoldChange, color=log2FoldChange)) +
  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin=log2FoldChange-error, xmax=log2FoldChange+error), width=0.5, height=0.5, position=position_dodge(0.05), colour = "black") +
  geom_point(size=8) + theme_bw() + scale_color_gradientn(colours = pal) + 
  theme(text = element_text(size = 22), legend.position = "none") + 
  ggtitle("Skin vs. Wound (overall)")
  #theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = -90, hjust = 0, vjust=0.5))
p1



sigrows = row.names(as.data.frame(p1$data))
outpal <- wes_palettes$Zissou1

p1b <- ps2.sgdra.melt %>% filter(ps2.sgdra.melt$OTU %in% sigrows)  %>%
  filter(!Abundance <= 0.0001) %>%
  group_by(Outcome, Species) %>%
  ggplot(aes(y=Species, x=Abundance, color=Description)) +
  geom_point(size=4) + theme_bw() +  
  theme(text = element_text(size = 22), 
        legend.position = "right",
        axis.text.y = element_blank(),
        axis.title.y = element_blank()) +
  ggtitle("Relative abundance") + 
  scale_color_manual(values = outpal[c(1,5)], name = "Sample Type") +
  scale_x_log10() + xlab("Relative abundance (%)")
p1b  

x = tapply(sigtab$log2FoldChange, sigtab$Species, function(x) max(x))
x = sort(x, TRUE)
p1b$data$Species = factor(as.character(p1b$data$Species), levels=names(x))

png("wound.vs.skin.overall.png", width = 24, height = 16, units = "in", res = 600)
grid.arrange(p1, p1b, ncol = 2)
dev.off()
```


## Pre vs. Post (Overall)
```{r}
# Pre vs. Post Overall

# calculate error
res.pp$error = (1.96*res.pp$lfcSE)
res.pp

alpha = 0.01
sigtab = res.pp[which(res.pp$padj < alpha), ]
sigtab = cbind(as(sigtab, "data.frame"), as(tax_table(ps2.pf)[rownames(sigtab), ], "matrix"))
head(sigtab)
dim(sigtab)
x = tapply(sigtab$log2FoldChange, sigtab$Species, function(x) max(x))
x = sort(x, TRUE)
sigtab$Type = factor(as.character(sigtab$Species), levels=names(x))

# Species order
x = tapply(sigtab$log2FoldChange, sigtab$Species, function(x) max(x))
x = sort(x, TRUE)
sigtab$Species = factor(as.character(sigtab$Species), levels=names(x))

# plot
# 
p1 <- ggplot(sigtab, aes(y=Species, x=log2FoldChange, color=log2FoldChange)) +
  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin=log2FoldChange-error, xmax=log2FoldChange+error), width=0.5, height=0.25, position=position_dodge(0.05), colour = "black") +
  geom_point(size=8) + theme_bw() + scale_color_gradientn(colours = pal) + 
  theme(text = element_text(size = 22), legend.position = "none") + 
  ggtitle("Post- vs. Pre- (overall)")
  #theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = -90, hjust = 0, vjust=0.5))
p1


sigrows = row.names(as.data.frame(p1$data))
outpal <- wes_palettes$Zissou1

p1b <- ps2.sgdra.melt %>% filter(ps2.sgdra.melt$OTU %in% sigrows)  %>%
  filter(SampleType != "Skin") %>%
  filter(!Abundance <= 0.0001) %>%
  group_by(Outcome, Species) %>%
  ggplot(aes(y=Species, x=Abundance, color=SampleType)) +
  geom_point(size=4) + theme_bw() +  
  theme(text = element_text(size = 22), 
        legend.position = "right",
        axis.text.y = element_blank(),
        axis.title.y = element_blank()) +
  ggtitle("Relative abundance") + 
  scale_color_manual(values = outpal[c(1,5)], name = "Sample Type") +
  scale_x_log10() + xlab("Relative abundance (%)")
p1b  

x = tapply(sigtab$log2FoldChange, sigtab$Species, function(x) max(x))
x = sort(x, TRUE)
p1b$data$Species = factor(as.character(p1b$data$Species), levels=names(x))

png("pre.vs.post.overall.TYPE.DECONNED.png", width = 16, height = 16, units = "in", res = 600)
grid.arrange(p1, p1b, ncol = 2)
dev.off()
```
## Pre vs. Post (Healed Only)
```{r}
# calc error
res.hpp$error = (1.96*res.hpp$lfcSE)
res.hpp

alpha = 0.05
sigtab = res.hpp[which(res.hpp$padj < alpha), ]
sigtab = cbind(as(sigtab, "data.frame"),
as(tax_table(ps2.pf)[rownames(sigtab), ], "matrix"))
head(sigtab)
dim(sigtab)
x = tapply(sigtab$log2FoldChange, sigtab$Type, function(x) max(x))
x = sort(x, TRUE)
sigtab$Type = factor(as.character(sigtab$Type), levels=names(x))

# Species order
x = tapply(sigtab$log2FoldChange, sigtab$Species, function(x) max(x))
x = sort(x, TRUE)
sigtab$Species = factor(as.character(sigtab$Species), levels=names(x))

# plot
# 
p1 <- ggplot(sigtab, aes(y=Species, x=log2FoldChange, color=log2FoldChange)) +
  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin=log2FoldChange-error, xmax=log2FoldChange+error), height=0.25, position=position_dodge(0.05), colour = "black") +
  geom_point(size=8) + theme_bw() + scale_color_gradientn(colours = pal) + 
  theme(text = element_text(size = 22), legend.position = "none") + 
  ggtitle("Post vs. Pre (Healed Only)")
  #theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = -90, hjust = 0, vjust=0.5))
p1


sigrows = row.names(as.data.frame(p1$data))
outpal <- wes_palettes$Zissou1

p1b <- ps2.sgdra.melt %>% filter(ps2.sgdra.melt$OTU %in% sigrows)  %>%
  filter(SampleType != "Skin") %>%
  filter(!Abundance <= 0.000001) %>%
  group_by(Outcome, Species) %>%
  ggplot(aes(y=Species, x=Abundance, color=SampleType)) +
  geom_point(size=4) + theme_bw() +  
  theme(text = element_text(size = 22), 
        legend.position = "right",
        axis.text.y = element_blank(),
        axis.title.y = element_blank()) +
  ggtitle("Relative abundance") + 
  scale_color_manual(values = outpal[c(5,1)], name = "Sample Type") +
  scale_x_log10() + xlab("Relative abundance (%)")
p1b  

newSTorder = c("Pre-Debridement","Post-Debridement","Skin")
# color order
newSTorder = c("Pre-Debridement","Post-Debridement")
p1b$data$SampleType <- as.character(p1b$data$SampleType)
p1b$data$SampleType <- factor(p1b$data$SampleType, levels=newSTorder)

png("pre.vs.post.healed.png", width = 16, height = 6, units = "in", res = 600)
grid.arrange(p1, p1b, ncol = 2)
dev.off()
```
## Pre vs. Post (Unhealed Only)
```{r}
# calc error
res.upp$error = (1.96*res.upp$lfcSE)
res.upp

alpha = 0.05
sigtab = res.upp[which(res.upp$padj < alpha), ]
sigtab = cbind(as(sigtab, "data.frame"), as(tax_table(ps2.pf)[rownames(sigtab), ], "matrix"))
head(sigtab)
dim(sigtab)
x = tapply(sigtab$log2FoldChange, sigtab$Type, function(x) max(x))
x = sort(x, TRUE)
sigtab$Type = factor(as.character(sigtab$Type), levels=names(x))

# Species order
x = tapply(sigtab$log2FoldChange, sigtab$Species, function(x) max(x))
x = sort(x, TRUE)
sigtab$Species = factor(as.character(sigtab$Species), levels=names(x))

# plot

p1 <- ggplot(sigtab, aes(y=Species, x=log2FoldChange, color=log2FoldChange)) +
  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin=log2FoldChange-error, xmax=log2FoldChange+error), height=0.1, position=position_dodge(0.05), colour = "black") + 
  geom_point(size=8) + theme_bw() + scale_color_gradientn(colours = pal) + 
  theme(text = element_text(size = 18)) + ggtitle("Post vs. Pre (Unhealed Only)")
  #theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = -90, hjust = 0, vjust=0.5))
p1
png("pre.vs.post.unhealed.png", width = 12, height = 12, units = "in", res = 600)
p1
dev.off()
```
## Healed vs. Unhealed (Overall)
```{r}
# Healed vs. Unhealed Overall
pal <- wes_palette("Zissou1", 3, type = "continuous")

# calculate error
res.hu$error = (res.hu$lfcSE)
res.hu

# alpha filter
alpha = 0.01
sigtab = res.hu[which(res.hu$padj < alpha), ]
# add taxonomy
sigtab = cbind(as(sigtab, "data.frame"),
as(tax_table(ps2v.pf)[rownames(sigtab), ], "matrix"))

# Set Y order
x = tapply(sigtab$log2FoldChange, sigtab$Species, function(x) max(x))
x = sort(x, TRUE)
sigtab$Species = factor(as.character(sigtab$Species), levels=names(x))

# plot log2fold change
p1 <- ggplot(sigtab, aes(y=Species, x=log2FoldChange, color=-log2FoldChange)) + geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin=log2FoldChange-error, xmax=log2FoldChange+error), height=0.25, position=position_dodge(0.05), colour = "black") +
  geom_point(size=8) + theme_bw() + scale_color_gradientn(colours = pal) + 
  theme(text = element_text(size = 22), 
        legend.position = "none",
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)) + 
  ggtitle("Unhealed vs. Healed") + ylab("Species")
  #theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = -90, hjust = 0, vjust=0.5))
p1


sigrows = row.names(as.data.frame(p1$data))
outpal <- wes_palettes$Zissou1

p1b <- ps2.sgdra.melt %>% filter(ps2.sgdra.melt$OTU %in% sigrows)  %>%
  filter(Outcome != "Skin") %>%
  filter(!Abundance <= 0.0001) %>%
  group_by(Outcome, Species) %>%
  ggplot(aes(y=Species, x=Abundance, color=Outcome)) +
  geom_point(size=4) + theme_bw() +  
  theme(text = element_text(size = 22), 
        legend.position = "right",
        axis.text.y = element_blank(),
        axis.title.y = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)) +
        ggtitle("Species Relative Abundance") +
  scale_color_manual(values = outpal[c(2,5)], name = "Outcome") +
  scale_x_log10() + xlab("Relative abundance (%)")
p1b  

x = tapply(sigtab$log2FoldChange, sigtab$Species, function(x) max(x))
x = sort(x, TRUE)
p1b$data$Species = factor(as.character(p1b$data$Species), levels=names(x))

png("healed.vs.unhealed.overall.species.png", width = 20, height = 14, units = "in", res = 1000)
grid.arrange(p1, p1b, widths=c(1,0.75), ncol = 2)
dev.off()

p1$data
```
# Healed vs Unhealed SKIN
```{r}
# calculate error

res.hu.skin$error = (1.96*res.hu.skin$lfcSE)

alpha = 0.05
sigtab = res.hu.skin[which(res.hu.skin$padj < alpha), ]
sigtab = cbind(as(sigtab, "data.frame"),
as(tax_table(ps2.pf)[rownames(sigtab), ], "matrix"))
head(sigtab)
dim(sigtab)
x = tapply(sigtab$log2FoldChange, sigtab$Type, function(x) max(x))
x = sort(x, TRUE)
sigtab$Type = factor(as.character(sigtab$Type), levels=names(x))

# Species order
x = tapply(sigtab$log2FoldChange, sigtab$Species, function(x) max(x))
x = sort(x, TRUE)
sigtab$Species = factor(as.character(sigtab$Species), levels=names(x))

# plot
p1 <- ggplot(sigtab, aes(y=Species, x=log2FoldChange, color=log2FoldChange)) +
  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin=log2FoldChange-error, xmax=log2FoldChange+error), height=0.25, position=position_dodge(0.05), colour = "black") +
  geom_point(size=8) + theme_bw() + scale_color_gradientn(colours = pal) + ggtitle("Unhealed vs. Healed (Skin Only)")
  #theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = -90, hjust = 0, vjust=0.5))
p1
png("healed.vs.unhealed.skin.png", width = 6, height = 6, units = "in", res = 600)
p1
dev.off()
```
## Healed vs. Unhealed (Pre- Only)
```{r}
# Healed vs. Unhealed Pre- only

# calculate error
res.hupre$error = (1.96*res.hupre$lfcSE)

alpha = 0.05
sigtab = res.hupre[which(res.hupre$padj < alpha), ]
sigtab = cbind(as(sigtab, "data.frame"),
as(tax_table(ps2.pf)[rownames(sigtab), ], "matrix"))
head(sigtab)
dim(sigtab)
x = tapply(sigtab$log2FoldChange, sigtab$Type, function(x) max(x))
x = sort(x, TRUE)
sigtab$Type = factor(as.character(sigtab$Type), levels=names(x))

# Species order
x = tapply(sigtab$log2FoldChange, sigtab$Species, function(x) max(x))
x = sort(x, TRUE)
sigtab$Species = factor(as.character(sigtab$Species), levels=names(x))

# plot
# 
p1 <- ggplot(sigtab, aes(y=Species, x=log2FoldChange, color=log2FoldChange)) +
  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin=log2FoldChange-error, xmax=log2FoldChange+error), height=0.25, position=position_dodge(0.05), colour = "black") +
  geom_point(size=8) + theme_bw() + scale_color_gradientn(colours = pal) + theme(text = element_text(size = 22)) + ggtitle("Unhealed vs. Healed (Pre- Only)")
  #theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = -90, hjust = 0, vjust=0.5))
p1
png("healed.vs.unhealed.pre.png", width = 12, height = 12, units = "in", res = 600)
p1
dev.off()
```

## Healed vs Unhealed (Post- Only)
```{r}
# Healed vs. Unhealed Post- only
alpha = 0.05
sigtab = res.hupost[which(res.hupost$padj < alpha), ]
sigtab = cbind(as(sigtab, "data.frame"),
as(tax_table(ps2.pf)[rownames(sigtab), ], "matrix"))
head(sigtab)
dim(sigtab)
x = tapply(sigtab$log2FoldChange, sigtab$Type, function(x) max(x))
x = sort(x, TRUE)
sigtab$Type = factor(as.character(sigtab$Type), levels=names(x))

# Species order
x = tapply(sigtab$log2FoldChange, sigtab$Species, function(x) max(x))
x = sort(x, TRUE)
sigtab$Species = factor(as.character(sigtab$Species), levels=names(x))

# plot
# 
p1 <- ggplot(sigtab, aes(y=Species, x=log2FoldChange, color=log2FoldChange)) + 
  geom_point(size=4) + theme_bw() + scale_color_gradientn(colours = pal)
  #theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = -90, hjust = 0, vjust=0.5))
p1
png("healed.vs.unhealed.post.png", width = 6, height = 12, units = "in", res = 600)
p1
dev.off()
```
